accountId.description: The unique pool account identifier of the order to be accepted.

get.description: Returns the full details of a specific marketplace quote, including allocation results, payment metadata (Bank or Crypto), and chat history timestamps.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the quote.

400.description: Invalid ID provided or unexpected error

put.description: Fetches the final status and payment instructions for a completed marketplace quote session.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the quote.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid ID or session state

put.description: Updates an existing quote session by adding or modifying the pool allocation details, including amount and direction.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the quote session.

400.description: Invalid pool details or quote state

put.description: Cancels an active or pending quote session. Once cancelled, the quote can no longer be accepted or completed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the quote to be cancelled.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid ID or quote cannot be cancelled in its current state

put.description: Removes a specific allocation or item from an existing quote session using the quote ID and item ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the quote session.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the item/allocation to remove.

200.description: Item removed successfully, returns updated quote state

400.description: Invalid ID or item not found

post.description: This endpoint is used to create a dynamic account to receive payments.

currency.description: According, to our currently supported currencies, this is in NGN and GHS.

accountName.description: Your desired naming for your account.

amount.description: Amount should be in the subunit of our supported currency i.e NGN and GHS for now.

expiresIn.description: This is optional to add. By default, the time it takes for a virtual account to expire is 30 mins. However, you can customize the time to lesser as you desire.

200.description: A JSON array of dynamic account objects.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token.

400.description: Not Found - No subscriptions found for the given plan ID.

get.description: This retrieves and lists all the active dynamic accounts you created.

200.description: A JSON array of dynamic details objects.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token.

400.description: Not Found - No subscriptions found for the given plan ID.

parameters.description: This is the unique ID generated upon creation of your dynamic account in either NGN or GHS.

200.description: A JSON array of dynamic details objects.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token.

400.description: Not Found - No subscriptions found for the given plan ID.

id.description: The unique identifier of the rate configuration.

partnerId.description: The unique identifier of the partner ID.

balanceId.description: The unique identifier of the balance ID.

sourceCurrency.description: The source currency for the trade pair

destinationCurrency.description: The destination currency for the trade pair

destinationNetwork.description: The network for the destination currency

rate.description: The exchange rate between source and destination currency

rateThreshold.description: The rate threshold for automatic rate adjustments

liquidityThreshold.description: Maximum liquidity limit before rate adjustment

GetRateResponse.description: Represents the current exchange rate and consensus metadata between two currencies.

chain.description: The blockchain network or settlement chain.

source.description: The mechanism used to determine the rate (e.g., CONSENSUS, ADMIN_OVERRIDE, MARKET_MAKER, SPOT).

timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of the rate generation.

StreamRateEvent.description: Individual rate update event in the SSE stream

StreamHeartbeat.description: Heartbeat event to keep connection alive

message.example: Unable to fetch rate from providers

reference.description: Unique idempotency reference for this withdrawal. Used to prevent duplicate withdrawals.

amount.description: Amount to withdraw (in token units, not subunits). Minimum: 10

toAddress.description: Destination blockchain address (must be valid EVM address)

reference.description: Unique reference provided in the request

estimatedFee.description: Estimated gas fee in token units

reference.description: Unique idempotency reference for this payout. Used to prevent duplicate transfers.

amount.description: Amount to transfer in subunits (kobo for NGN, pesewas for GHS). Minimum: 100

saveRecipient.description: Save recipient details for future use

recipientAlias.description: Friendly name for saved recipient (required if saveRecipient is true)

accountNumber.description: Recipient bank account number (10 digits for Nigerian banks)

accountName.description: Account holder name (must match bank records)

bankCode.description: Bank code (3 digits for Nigerian banks, 6 digits for Ghanaian banks)

branchCode.description: Bank branch code (optional for most Nigerian banks)

reference.description: Unique reference provided in the request
Unique idempotency reference for this payout. Used to prevent duplicate transfers.

providerStatus.description: Status of the transaction with the upstream provider.

totalAmount.description: Total amount to exchange (can include commas)

amount.description: Amount to allocate to this provider (0 for auto-allocation)

poolId.description: The unique identifier of the liquidity pool.

amountDirection.description: Specifies if the amount refers to the source or destination currency.

totalSourceAmount.description: Total source amount across all allocations

totalDestinationAmount.description: Total destination amount across all allocations

liquidityThreshold.description: Maximum liquidity limit before rate adjustment

message.example: Invalid source currency. Supported: NGN, GHS

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication using Bearer token
